name: plasma: solar wind at L1 (live)
source_note: NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (real-time solar wind) — fetched 2026-07-11 19:40 UTC — Data: NOAA SWPC / DSCOVR-ACE (public domain)

proton_density.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of solar wind proton density (how much plasma is streaming past), in cm^-3, recorded by a solar wind plasma analyzer — 2,804 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (real-time solar wind), fetched 2026-07-11 19:40 UTC.

proton_speed.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of solar wind speed, in km/s, recorded by a solar wind plasma analyzer — 2,804 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (real-time solar wind), fetched 2026-07-11 19:40 UTC.

proton_temperature.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of solar wind proton temperature, in K, recorded by a solar wind plasma analyzer — 2,804 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (real-time solar wind), fetched 2026-07-11 19:40 UTC.
